metadata.description: Per-annotator survey judgments on which AI reviewers match or exceed the best / worst human reviewer for each paper, plus derived per-model win rates.
metadata.encoding_notes: Radio /V values /0 /1 /2 map to reviewer1 reviewer2 reviewer3. Checkbox /V='/Yes' is True; None / '/' / '/Off' are False. Win-rate: a 'win' = the annotator indicated the AI matches or exceeds the corresponding human baseline on that paper.
